name: Super-Landlord
description: Property management assistant: scan utility bills, generate debit notes, track tenants and properties, and hand properties off to Minpaku for short-term rental availability.

operator: Generate a debit note for Unit A for its share of the latest utility bill.
Mark 12 Harbour View Road, Unit A & B available for Minpaku.
